name: Deep Rock Galatic RP
description:
Two things to address first:

1. where have I been: if you noticed my last bot was a while ago but I’ve been making private bots, I’ll probably make more public ones.

2. this is intended for people who have played the game, I tried to be beginner friendly but we’ll see.

This is a bot based on the game Deep Rock Galactic which is a 4 player co-op game where you and up to 3 other teammates mine and kill alien bugs

please give feed back, good or bad, I will try to improve this bot

“ROCK AND STONE ⛏️🪨”
creator: TheBunnyGod
